latin: Unam horam hic manere unum annum ibi significat. tempus prope nigrum foramen lentius fluit. dum exploratores in planeta sunt, filii eorum senescunt.

questions.prompt: What happens to time near the black hole?
What is the tragic consequence for the explorers?
questions.target: Their children age while they are away
choices: Their children age while they are away

translation: Staying here one hour means one year there. Time flows more slowly near the black hole. While the explorers are on the planet, their children grow old.
